title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Jwaneng Town Council (nuisance Control) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Jwaneng Town Council (nuisance Control) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Jwaneng Town Council (Nuisance Control) Bye-Laws.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Nuisance prohibited

definitions.definition: a written legal communication to a violator requiring the stoppage of a nuisance with immediate effect or placing restrictions on when and how long an activity can occur or place other restrictions as necessary
a wireless, loudspeaker, record player, amplifier or any similar device
the written permission issued by the Council, with or without conditions
any disturbance that materially interferes with another persons enjoyment of his or her own home or habitation and it may be experienced by one person or group of persons in a neighbourhood
an area designated by the Council as an area where the issue of a noise licence is likely to cause disturbance or nuisance to the premises in the neighbourhood.
